_licenseStatus: Cloud SaaS — license-safe (paid API). Self-hosted Firecrawl is AGPL-3.0; Cloud API is NOT AGPL-restricted for end users.

data.tagline: Selling a painting? Pieter arranges it.
data.value_prop: At PieterKoopt®, we offer a quick, personal, and hassle-free selling experience - no fees, transparent offers within 48 hours.

process_steps.title: Upload your Artwork
process_steps.description: Take clear photos, tell the story behind your artwork and upload everything easily via our platform.

process_steps.title: Review by Pieter
process_steps.description: We carefully review your submission. If your painting qualifies, we'll arrange a personal viewing. You will hear from us within 48 hours.

process_steps.title: Personal Appointment
process_steps.description: If your artwork is suitable, we will schedule an appointment. Pieter will visit you together with a specialist and give you a fair offer straight away.

data.pricing_info: No commission fees; you receive 100% of the offer.
data.target_audience: Individuals looking to sell their paintings

_qualityNotes: CTA classification disagrees with branding endpoint: branding said primary="Sell your painting" (dark bg, button #2). Extract said primary="Request Offer". Reasonable LLM ambiguity since site has multiple CTAs in different contexts (nav, hero, sticky footer). Both are valid; report this as evidence that LLM judgment varies between calls.

Tech stack detection shallow (just "CDN", "HTML5"). Did NOT identify Webflow despite obvious markers (cdn.prod.website-files.com, w-* class prefixes). Suggests need for explicit prompt about framework signatures.
Process step descriptions captured verbatim — high quality.
Address geocoded correctly (Johan de Wittstraat 33, Dordrecht).
Nothing hallucinated — all output verifiable in source HTML.
